# Khatakshetra

Khatakshetra is a Hindu stories, festivals, deity hubs, temple guide, quiz, booklet, and family activity website. The project repository is PuranaIthihasa.

## Important Pages

- Home: https://khatakshetra.com/
- Story library: https://khatakshetra.com/stories
- Deity hubs: https://khatakshetra.com/deities
- Games and quizzes: https://khatakshetra.com/games
- Festival calendar: https://khatakshetra.com/festivals
- Temple guides: https://khatakshetra.com/temples
- Booklets and PDFs: https://khatakshetra.com/booklets
- Drawing kits: https://khatakshetra.com/drawing-kits

## Launch Experiences

- Ramayana starter story experience with story, quiz, coloring book, and booklet.
- Shani Dev story experience with karma reflection, quiz, talapatra cards, and booklet.
- Ganesha beginnings experience with story, quiz, drawing, and kit interest.
- Dashavatara collection with ten avatar cards and quiz path.
